name: Aniseed Sparkles (RAINBOW LICORICE DELIGHTS)150g
description:
Aniseed sparkles are a type of candy that is popular in the United Kingdom and other parts of Europe. They are small, hard candies that are typically red or pink in color and have a distinctive anise flavor, which is similar to licorice.

Aniseed sparkles are often made with sugar and anise extract, which gives them their characteristic flavor. They are also sometimes coated with a sugary layer that gives them a slightly sparkling appearance, which is how they got their name.

These candies are often enjoyed as a sweet treat, and they can be found in most candy stores and specialty shops that carry British and European sweets. They can also be purchased online for those who want to enjoy this unique candy outside of Europe. Aniseed sparkles are a great option for those who enjoy the flavor of licorice or anise and are looking for a sweet and satisfying candy to snack on.

Presenting the spectacular, the magnificent, the fantasmagorical, the radical, unbelievable Aniseed Sparkles!
Flavour: Aniseed/Licorice
Colour: Multicoloured
